records.question: Which appellations in California’s North Coast area have wines from the Laird Family winery in 2007 with a score of exactly 90, priced at most $30, and with no more than 1500 cases?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT appellations.no FROM appellations
JOIN wine ON appellations.appelation = wine.appelation
WHERE wine.score = 90 AND wine.price <= 30 AND appellations.state = 'California' AND wine.cases <= 1500 AND wine.year = 2007 AND wine.winery = 'Laird Family' AND appellations.area = 'North Coast'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT appellations.No 
FROM wine 
JOIN appellations ON wine.Appelation = appellations.Appelation 
WHERE appellations.State = 'California' 
AND appellations.Area = 'North Coast' 
AND wine.Winery = 'Laird Family' 
AND wine.Year = 2007 
AND wine.Score = 90 
AND wine.Price <= 30 
AND wine.Cases <= 1500

records.question: Where are the appellations in California that have red grapes used in Knotty Vines wines from 2007 or later, priced at least $20, scored at most 86, and meant to be drunk now?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT appellations.no FROM appellations
JOIN wine ON appellations.appelation = wine.appelation
JOIN grapes ON wine.grape = grapes.grape
WHERE wine.drink = 'now' AND wine.price >= 20 AND wine.score <= 86 AND wine.state = 'California' AND wine.name = 'Knotty Vines' AND wine.year >= 2007 AND appellations.state = 'California' AND grapes.color = 'Red'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT appellations.No 
FROM appellations 
JOIN wine ON appellations.Appelation = wine.Appelation 
JOIN grapes ON wine.Grape = grapes.Grape 
WHERE appellations.State = 'California' 
AND grapes.Color = 'Red' 
AND wine.Year >= 2007 
AND wine.Price >= 20 
AND wine.Score <= 86 
AND wine.Drink = 'Now'

records.question: Which appellations in the North Coast area where the county is Lake and isava is No are associated with Langtry winery’s Tephra Ridge Vineyard wines from California with at least year 2006 and exactly 205 cases?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT appellations.no FROM appellations
JOIN wine ON appellations.appelation = wine.appelation
WHERE wine.cases = 205 AND appellations.county = 'Lake' AND appellations.isava = 'No' AND wine.name = 'Tephra Ridge Vineyard' AND wine.state = 'California' AND wine.year >= 2006 AND appellations.area = 'North Coast' AND wine.winery = 'Langtry'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT appellations.No 
FROM appellations 
JOIN wine ON appellations.Appelation = wine.Appelation 
WHERE appellations.Area = 'North Coast' 
  AND appellations.County = 'Lake' 
  AND appellations.isAVA = 'No' 
  AND wine.Winery = 'Langtry' 
  AND wine.Name = 'Tephra Ridge Vineyard' 
  AND wine.State = 'California' 
  AND wine.Year >= 2006 
  AND wine.Cases = 205
